items.title: A new video from the White House mixes Call of Duty footage with actual video of Iran strikes
items.summary: On Wednesday, the White House posted a video of actual military strikes on Iran in the style usually seen in Call of Duty highlight videos, and started the video with a clip from Call of Duty.
